title: That Time I Went to a Mixer and...
overview: Three guys meet three cute boys at a mixer with no girls?!

title: That Time I Went to the Bar and...
overview: Tokiwa and the others go to the drag bar for the first time.

title: That Time I Went to an Izakaya and...
overview: Kohaku invites Hagi to hang out. Fuji asks Asagi to come over to her place so he can do her a favor.

title: That Time I Went to the Zoo and...
overview: Suo says the gang should hang out this weekend, so Tokiwa, Asagi, and Hagi go to their rendezvous spot without knowing exactly where they’re going.

title: That Time I Went to a Comic Convention and...
overview: Fuji invites Asagi to a “festival.” But when he gets there, Asagi finds out he is actually at a comic convention.

title: That Time I Went to Your Place and...
overview: While talking to Kohaku at the bar, Hagi realizes he has romantic feelings for her.

title: That Time I Went Camping and...
overview: The six friends arrive at a campsite. The gang enjoys a barbecue in the great outdoors.

title: That Time I Went to Campus and...
overview: Tokiwa takes a walk with a non-cross-dressing Suo. Meanwhile, Asagi is alone with Fuji at the Bar Rose.

title: That Time I Went to a Summer Festival and...
overview: Hagi invites Kohaku to a summer festival. The other four members of the gang also go to the festival to watch them from the shadows.

title: That Time You Went to My Place and...
overview: Asagi decides he wants to learn how to be cool because of something Fuji said to him. Fuij notices something weird is up with Asagi.

title: That Time I Went to the Beach and...
overview: At Kohaku’s request, her friends help her out at a beach house. Meanwhile, Suo wants to have some fun in the sun and takes Tokiwa along with her.

title: That Time I Went to a Mixer and... (Thought I'd Never Need to Go to Another Mixer Again)
overview: Hagi confides in Kohaku about his recent emotional turmoil. Later, Tokiwa goes sightseeing by himself and runs into Suo.
